claim: The Bank of Japan is in a gradual tightening cycle, having raised rates from negative territory to 0.75% since March 2024, with a cautious pace dependent on data and inflation outlook.

provenance.definition: The Bank of Japan is in a gradual tightening cycle, having raised rates from negative territory to 0.75% since March 2024, with a cautious pace dependent on data and inflation outlook.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: more specific levels held 0 case(s) (< 4); pooled up to 'same_institution'

cases.description: BOJ raised policy rate from -0.1% to 0-0.1% in March 2024, first hike in 17 years.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank decided to change the guideline for market operations... the uncollateralized overnight call rate to be around 0 to 0.1%.

cases.description: BOJ raised rate to 0.25% in July 2024.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank decided to raise the guideline for the uncollateralized overnight call rate to around 0.25%.

cases.description: BOJ raised rate to 0.5% in January 2025.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank decided to raise the guideline for the uncollateralized overnight call rate to around 0.5%.

cases.description: BOJ raised rate to 0.75% in March 2025.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank decided to raise the guideline for the uncollateralized overnight call rate to around 0.75%.

claim: At the April 2026 meeting, three board members dissented in favor of a hike to 1.0%, indicating internal pressure for tightening.

provenance.definition: At the April 2026 meeting, three board members dissented in favor of a hike to 1.0%, indicating internal pressure for tightening.
provenance.level_fallback_reason: all levels sparse (total 1 usable case(s)); rate is wide by construction

cases.description: April 27-28, 2026 meeting: three members proposed raising rate to 1.0%, defeated 6-3.
cases.basis_quote: Three members proposed raising the uncollateralized overnight call rate to around 1.0%... the proposal was defeated by a majority vote.

claim: Market-implied probability of a June hike is around 63% as of mid-May 2026, with Reuters reporting the BOJ has signaled a possible hike.

cases.description: Reuters reported on May 12, 2026 that the BOJ has 'locked in' signals for a June rate hike.
cases.basis_quote: The Bank of Japan has locked in signals for a June rate hike, sources say.
